package rulecoverage

func NegativeUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonly() string {
    ruleID := "unnecessary_slice_copy_for_readonly"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`copy := append([]T(nil), original...)` when `copy` is only read, never mutated"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
